items.description: Define the report structure and format.
Gather all findings and organize them by themes.
Draft the Findings section, including visuals.
Review the draft for clarity and coherence.
Revise sections based on the review.
Prepare a presentation based on the report.

name: get_todo_list
result_content:

[ ] 1. [medium] Gather all findings and organize them by themes.
[ ] 2. [medium] Draft the Introduction section.
[ ] 3. [medium] Draft the Methodology section.
[ ] 4. [medium] Draft the Findings section, including visuals.
[ ] 5. [medium] Draft the Discussion section.
[ ] 6. [medium] Draft the Conclusion section.
[ ] 7. [medium] Draft the References section.
[ ] 8. [medium] Review the draft for clarity and coherence.
[ ] 9. [medium] Revise sections based on the review.
[ ] 10. [medium] Finalize the report formatting.
[ ] 11. [medium] Create an Executive Summary.
[ ] 12. [medium] Prepare a presentation based on the report.
